semantic.role: Pure utility functions for rendering structured text blocks, primarily used in LLM prompt construction within ArchSpine.
responsibilities: Renders an identity block string that defines the role and target for a summarization task.
Renders an instructions block string from an array of instruction items with numbered formatting.
Renders a context block string with a title and context data, wrapped in XML-like tags.
outOfScope: Parsing or interpreting the content of rendered blocks.
Handling file I/O or network communication.
invariants: Output is deterministic string concatenation and formatting.
No external dependencies or runtime configuration.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide reusable, isolated text block generators for consistent prompt and context formatting across the system.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Restoration of LLM-authored markdown generation capabilities, likely involving these rendering utilities.
